nasb.text: A man found him, and behold, he was wandering in the field; and the man asked him, “What are you looking for?”

esv.text: And a man found him wandering in the fields. And the man asked him, “What are you seeking?”

cnv.text: 有人遇見約瑟在田間迷了路，就問他說：“你找甚麼？”

ccb.text: 有人见他在田野走迷了路，就问他：“你在找什么？”

csbs.text: 有人遇见他，看哪，他正在田野中徘徊。那人就问他：“你在找什么？”
